events.agenda: 6:30-7:00pm Check in/Registration; 7:00-7:15pm Welcome Remarks; 7:15-7:35pm Talk #1 + Q&A; 7:35-7:55pm Talk #2 + Q&A; 7:55-8:00pm Closing Remarks; 8:00-8:45pm Reception.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: WeWork Los Balsos, Carrera 42 #5 Sur-145, Medellín
events.raw_text:
Wed, Sep 4, 2024 · 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM COT

Talk #1: dbt turbocharge: Optimización de queries en dbt, Juan Manuel Perafan (Xebia)
Talk #2: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs

talks.description: Query optimization tips and strategies for dbt users applicable across most SQL engines, not limited to a specific data platform.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt turbocharge: Optimización de queries en dbt. En esta charla, nos centraremos en la optimización de queries para los usuarios de dbt, sin limitar nuestro enfoque a un plataforma de datos en específico.
talks.title: dbt turbocharge: Optimización de queries en dbt

talks.description: How to use LLMs within a dbt environment to categorize unstructured text data directly in the dbt workflow, including configuring a dbt project with the OpenAI API and a Python model.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs: En esta charla, descubrirás cómo usar LLMs dentro de tu entorno dbt.
talks.title: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs

events.agenda: 6:30-7:00pm Check in/Registration; 7:00-7:15pm Welcome Remarks; 7:15-7:35pm Talk #1 + Q&A; 7:35-7:55pm Talk #2 + Q&A; 7:55-8:00pm Closing Remarks; 8:00-8:45pm Reception.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: WeWork Los Balsos, Carrera 42 #5 Sur-145, Medellín
events.raw_text:
Tue, Jun 11, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

Talk #1: Ensuring Reliable Data with dbt Macros and Observability, Sebastian Rojas (Factored)
Talk #2: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt

talks.description: The practical application of dbt macros in tackling common data quality challenges like data inconsistency, and how macros aid in capturing observability and quality measurements for monitoring.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Ensuring Reliable Data with dbt Macros and Observability: Monitoring Solutions for data quality issues. We'll explore the practical application of dbt Macros in tackling common data quality challenges such as data inconsistency.
talks.title: Ensuring Reliable Data with dbt Macros and Observability

talks.description: How dbt can aid Tableau dashboard deployment by consolidating dispersed domain knowledge to increase data reliability as companies grow.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt: Maintaining dashboards gets more complicated as companies grow and business logic is embedded across different places. We will see how dbt can aid in dashboard deployment by consolidating dispersed domain knowledge.
talks.title: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt

events.agenda: 6:30-7:00pm Check in/Registration; 7:00-7:15pm Welcome Remarks; 7:15-7:35pm Talk #1 + Q&A; 7:35-7:55pm Talk #2 + Q&A; 7:55-8:00pm Closing Remarks; 8:00-8:45pm Reception.

Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: WeWork Los Balsos, Carrera 42 #5 Sur-145, Medellín
events.raw_text:
Tue, Nov 28, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

Talk #1: Data Engineers vs. Data Analysts: How dbt Breaks Barriers and Redefines Collaboration, Miguel Ortiz (La Haus)
Talk #2: How Slow Changing Dimensions are Handled on dbt

talks.description: The evolution of data engineer and data analyst roles in a contemporary data management environment, with a focus on how dbt breaks down traditional barriers and reshapes collaboration.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Data Engineers vs. Data Analysts: How dbt Breaks Barriers and Redefines Collaboration. - At this talk we will explore the evolution of data engineer and data analyst roles within a contemporary data management environment.
talks.title: Data Engineers vs. Data Analysts: How dbt Breaks Barriers and Redefines Collaboration

talks.description: How slowly changing dimensions are handled in dbt, focusing on incremental models and snapshots.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: How Slow Changing Dimensions are Handled on dbt - In this presentation, we'll delve into the world of data modeling, focusing on the power of incremental models and snapshots.
talks.title: How Slow Changing Dimensions are Handled on dbt

events.location: WeWork Los Balsos, Carrera 42 #5 Sur-145, Medellín
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jul 27, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

Talk #1: How day-to-day data team problems can become opportunities, Santiago Jaramillo
Talk #2: Migrating an ETL pipeline from Excel/BigQuery scheduled queries to dagster, airbyte, and dbt for a healthcare company, Pablo Osorio

talks.description: How day-to-day problems in data teams can become opportunities to improve processes with the right tooling and add value to organizations.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Let's discover how our day-to-day "problems" in data teams can become an excellent opportunity to improve our processes with the right tool and add value to organizations.
talks.title: How day-to-day data team problems can become opportunities

talks.description: Migrating a healthcare company's ETL pipeline from Excel and BigQuery scheduled queries to a scalable solution using Dagster, Airbyte, and dbt, eliminating bottlenecks.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: As we unveil a game-changing approach to our data architecture of a healthcare company. Witness the migration of an ETL pipeline primarily reliant on Excel and BigQuery scheduled queries to a scalable, robust solution. By leveraging the power of dagster, airbyte, and dbt.
talks.title: Migrating a healthcare ETL pipeline to Dagster, Airbyte, and dbt

excluded_events.event_name: Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
excluded_events.reason: Generic dbt Labs community webinar cross-posted to this group, not Medellín-specific
Generic dbt Labs community webinar cross-posted to this group, not Medellín-specific
